# airflow_role (Resource)

Provides an Airflow role. Note this resource is not supported on Airflow v3 (API v2): the Roles API is not available in Airflow v3.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "airflow_role" "example" {
  name = "example"

  action {
    action   = "can_read"
    resource = "Audit Logs"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role.

### Optional

- `action` (Block Set) The action struct that defines the role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--action))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The role name.

<a id="nestedblock--action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `action`

Required:

- `action` (String) The name of the permission.
- `resource` (String) The name of the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import airflow_role.example example
```
